question: Which phrase means 'the gradual disappearance of the area where animals live'?
Poisonous gases produced by car engines and factories are called ________.
Heavy snow with very cold temperatures below zero are called ________ temperatures.
Choose the correct option. 'She ________ a new coat today.' (already decided earlier)
Choose the correct answer. 'Sorry about breaking the mug. I ________ you a new one.' (decision now)
Read: 'In 2018, the proportion of the world's population living in extreme poverty fell to around 10%.' What does this suggest?
choices: There has been some improvement in poverty rates.
correct_answer: There has been some improvement in poverty rates.

question: Which of these is NOT a feature of the blobfish described in the text?
The threat to the pangolin is described as 'far from accidental' because ________.
choices: they are deliberately targeted by poachers
they are easy to find in forests
correct_answer: they are deliberately targeted by poachers

question: Which word describes an animal 'related to the sea'?
In paragraph C of 'They Need Saving Too', what protects pangolins from natural predators?
Complete: 'Powerful computers are almost definitely going to become smaller, faster and cheaper. Powerful computers ________ smaller, faster and cheaper.'
Which option correctly completes: 'I can't ________ my mind.'
'That's a good point, but another option might be...' is used to ________.
If you start a formal letter with the person's name (e.g. Dear Mr Haddad), you end it with ________.
In formal writing, instead of 'Please investigate other options', you should write ________.
choices: I would ask you to investigate other options.
You should look into other options.
correct_answer: I would ask you to investigate other options.

question: Read: 'It is vital that this is reduced as much as possible.' What does 'this' refer to in Farid's email?
Choose the correct future form: 'The annual charity day ________ at 9 a.m.'
Choose correctly: 'They ________ announce the winners.' (very soon)
Which correctly expresses a Future Perfect Continuous action? Choose the correct sentence.
choices: By July I will live in London for 3 years.
By July I will have been living in London for 3 years.
By July I am going to live in London for 3 years.
By July I will be living in London for 3 years.
correct_answer: By July I will have been living in London for 3 years.

question: 'As in previous years, the head teacher ________ how much money we raised.' (routine future event)
Which phrase means almost certainly will happen (very strong certainty)?
Read: 'Global warming is certain to lead to more water shortages.' Which structure is used?
Which word means 'the hard structure inside the body of an animal or person'?
Read: 'Less well-known creatures are far more likely to become extinct because they don't get enough attention from researchers.' What does this imply?
choices: All animals receive equal research funding.
Popular animals receive more research funding than others.
Researchers prefer all types of animals equally.
correct_answer: Popular animals receive more research funding than others.

question: A compound noun is made up of ________ words.
In the compound noun 'swimming pool', the first word is a ________.
Which sentence is correctly written in formal email style?
choices: I'm writing to tell you I'm bothered.
I am writing to express my concern.
correct_answer: I am writing to express my concern.

question: Read: 'As a result of better medicine, people are likely to live until the age of 100.' Which word could replace 'As a result of'?
Which cause-and-effect phrase comes before the RESULT in the sentence?
Choose the correct answer: 'The cafe ________ on Friday.' (official/formal closure)
Which of these best describes a signpost in a lecture?
choices: A long explanation of a topic
A phrase that helps listeners follow what the speaker is saying
A visual aid used during the talk
correct_answer: A phrase that helps listeners follow what the speaker is saying

question: When planning a persuasive presentation, you should plan a strong ________ and conclusion.
To engage your audience in a presentation, you can use ________.
choices: good eye contact and a varied voice
correct_answer: good eye contact and a varied voice

question: 'I'm deeply concerned by the amount of plastic.' The phrase 'I am deeply concerned by' is used for ________.
choices: explaining why the issue is important
correct_answer: explaining why the issue is important

question: Which option correctly describes 'future arrangement with another person'?
choices: I'll take a look when I get there.

question: Choose the correct collocation: 'We had ________ winds last night which damaged many houses.'
Read: 'Their scales protect them from their natural predators, but it's simple for a poacher to just pick them up.' Why are pangolins easy for poachers?
choices: Their protective scales do not work against humans.
correct_answer: Their protective scales do not work against humans.

question: Which of these is an example of a cause-and-effect phrase where the CAUSE comes after?
The word 'primate' refers to ________.
choices: a group of mammals that includes monkeys and apes
correct_answer: a group of mammals that includes monkeys and apes

question: Which of these is NOT a rhetorical device mentioned in the Life Skills section?
